polymorphInstance.message: JPEG file format does not support Monochrome color mode.

definitions.description: supported with PDF/A only (basically the normal/high compression setting)
supported for TIFF/MTIFF when color is MONO. Supported values are Auto and G4
supported for TIFF/MTIFF when color is color/gray. Supported values are tiff60 and posttiff60. OJPEG is tiff6, JPEG is postTiff6
